---
name: Oracle
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Do a comprehensive analysis of the package to determine which "generalized" features and categories of features would be best to implement next. There's plenty of work to still do so this question is about prioritization, in the "systems" aspects - other systems that would naturally fit existing systems and would result in genuinely more flexible or otherwise improved behaviours - rank the best candidates in order of the best to implement first so subsequent systems will have them from the start. If any functionality requires native OS extensions or any other non-portable constructs or functionality that would require non-portable code or extensions then do not implement that functionality.
